profile_basis: Post-Cholesky linalg profile identified linalg/pinv_192x192_f64 as the top fj-lax row. Focused RCH baseline and candidate both ran on ts1.
tested_lever: Replace jacobi_eigendecomposition_cyclic's two full row/column passes per rotation with a symmetry-preserving off-block mirror update while keeping the same sweep order, apq skip, Schur coefficients, exact p/q annihilation, tolerance, and V update.
reason_rejected: The candidate preserved the intended algorithm shape but regressed the profile-backed benchmark. Source was restored with apply_patch; no production code from this lever is retained.

initial_baseline_stdout.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=.rch-target-sf71s-baseline rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/pinv_192x192_f64'

candidate.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=.rch-target-sf71s-candidate rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/pinv_192x192_f64'

restored_baseline.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=.rch-target-sf71s-restored rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/pinv_192x192_f64'

isomorphism.status: not promoted to full proof because the perf gate failed

next_primitive.direction: Replace the Gram-matrix cyclic-Jacobi pinv path rather than micro-tuning it.
next_primitive.candidate: direct one-sided Jacobi SVD or Golub-Kahan bidiagonalization for pinv/SVD so square pinv avoids forming A^T A and reduces condition-number squaring.
next_primitive.target_ratio: 2x+ on linalg/pinv_192x192_f64 with JAX tolerance proof and rcond/rank-deficient guard coverage
